data.title: Cleanup: @playwright/cli sessions have no error-path cleanup on sub-agent interruption
data.description: Multiple skills (playwright-debug, ui-discover, validate-work) use @playwright/cli open -s=SESSION_NAME to start browser sessions and @playwright/cli close -s=SESSION_NAME to end them. The close command only runs in the happy-path code flow. When a sub-agent is interrupted (SIGURG from tool timeout, context compaction, session crash), the close command never runs, leaving the browser process orphaned. No trap handler or equivalent cleanup mechanism exists in any of these skills. Fix: add trap-based cleanup to the skill patterns so that SIGURG/SIGTERM triggers @playwright/cli close before exit.
